_meta.description: Config for Errors Alert tab: form submission zero-check and error percentage threshold alerts per journey

time_range._comment: Cumulative data is fetched from start_hour_ist (8 AM IST) up to (current IST hour - 1). The check only runs when current IST hour > start_hour_ist, i.e. from 9 AM onward.

journey_error_thresholds._comment: Journey names must match exactly as they appear in Adobe Analytics (evar83). Any journey not listed here uses default_error_percentage_threshold.
